name: Jungle Curry with Catfish - Gaeng Paa Pla Dook
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. In a mortar and pestle or blender, combine all the curry paste ingredients.
- 2 tbsp chopped lemon grass
- 8 shallots
- 6 cloves garlic
- 1/4 cup chopped lesser ginger
- 8 dried jalapeno peppers
- 1 tsp canned peppercorns
- 1 tsp shrimp paste
- 1/2 tsp salt
2. Heat a large saucepan and add 2 tbsp oil.
3. Add the curry paste to the hot oil and stir-fry for 1 minute on medium-high heat.
4. Add 1 1/2 lbs catfish, cut into 1-inch slices, to the pan.
5. Stir in 1/4 cup fish sauce (nam pla) and 3 cups water.
6. Add 1/2 cup chopped Thai eggplant and 1/4 cup sliced green jalapeno pepper.
7. Stir in 1/2 cup sweet basil leaves and 10 whole kaffir lime leaves.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
9. Serve the curry hot.
